evidence.summary: M6 runbook, handoff, and promotion checklist update delivered. evidence-backend-runbook.zh-TW.md updated with M6 convergence loop section (opt-in env vars, pre-flight gates, enable/disable SOP, rollback paths). cutover-promotion-checklist.json extended with C1-C6 items (C1-C2 pending operator runs; C3-C6 go). evidence-backend-smoke-commands.json extended with convergence-loop-integration group (4 commands, 21 smoke tests). Production cutover remains blocked; operator gates preserved.

artifacts.description: Added M6 section: opt-in env vars (SANGUO_RAG_CONVERGENCE_REPO_ENABLED/MODE/DRY_RUN), M6 pre-flight gate table, enable/disable SOP with command examples, rollback table, smoke command block, and updated env vars table + footer references.

Added convergence-loop-integration section with C1-C6: C1 parity-rehearsal-x3 (pending), C2 vector-smoke-x2 (pending), C3 disabled-by-default (go), C4 manifest-write+resume (go), C5 budget-telemetry (go), C6 runbook-updated (go). Added C1/C2 to remainingPending. Added convergenceLoopIntegration rollback triggers.

Added convergence-loop-integration group with 4 commands: convergence-repo-seam-smoke (6/6), convergence-manifest-smoke (6/6), convergence-parity-rehearsal-smoke (3/3), convergence-vector-smoke (6/6). Total M6 smoke coverage: 21 tests.
